data.title: Victoria's Secret Lifts FY24 Guidance After Strong Q3: Sees Holiday Momentum
data.description: Victoria's Secret (VSCO) stock up 3.93% after reporting Q3 results, beating revenue estimates with 7% growth and adjusted EPS loss of $(0.50).
